raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The 2020 Census will shape California's future for the next decade.",
    "Accurate Congressional representation and billions of dollars in federal funding are at stake due to the census.",
    "For every Californian not counted in 2020, state and local governments will lose $1,950 per resident per year.",
    "More than 20 percent of California's populated areas are considered 'hard-to-count.'",
    "California has made an unprecedented investment in education and outreach for the census.",
    "State leaders have committed $100.3 million toward strategies to ensure an accurate count in California.",
    "Governor Newsom's FY 2019-20 proposed budget includes an additional $54 million for census efforts.",
    "A statewide media campaign will address gaps in hard-to-count communities."
  ]
}
```
